# Player Character Template

## Format

```
**[Name]** - [Concept/Playbook]

Stats: [stat]: [value], [stat]: [value]...
Moves: [move1], [move2]...
Gear: [item1], [item2]...
```

## Placeholders

| Placeholder | Description | Example |
|-------------|-------------|---------|
| `[Name]` | Character name | "Marcus" |
| `[Concept/Playbook]` | Archetype or class | "The Gunlugger" |
| `[stat]` | Attribute name | "Cool", "Hard" |
| `[value]` | Numeric value | "+2", "-1" |
| `[move]` | Special ability | "Seize by Force" |
| `[item]` | Equipment | "Assault rifle" |

## Customization Notes

Adapt this template based on the game system:
- For classless systems: replace `[Playbook]` with `[Background]` or `[Concept]`
- For skill-based systems: add `Skills:` section
- For narrative systems: add `Aspects:` or `Traits:` section
- For resource-based systems: add `Resources:` or `Pool:` section
